heroSub: Twelve contemporary hillside residences where Mediterranean light meets attainable living.
introText: Set high above Paphos in the tranquil village of Marathounda, Terra Something is a collection of twelve architect-designed maisonettes. Natural stone, crisp white render and generous glazing frame uninterrupted sunset views across the Mediterranean — all within ten minutes of the city.

selling.d: Qualifies for the reduced 5% VAT rate on primary residences under Law 42(I)/2023.
Buyers may be eligible for government housing grants available in rural areas.
Each residence is delivered with its own independent title deed.
Elevated 300m+ position with panoramic western views over the coast.
Natural stone cladding, white render, timber accents — built to last.
Dedicated parking for every residence plus visitor spaces.

resSub: Select a residence to view details. Lower terrace and upper terrace homes available.
gallerySub: A closer look at the architecture, materials and setting.
planCaption: Indicative layout. Exact areas per residence shown above.
calcSub: Indicative monthly repayment based on Eurobank Cyprus housing loan terms.
calcNote: Indicative only. Eurobank offers up to 80% LTV, terms to 30 years, with a 0.10–0.25% green discount for energy-efficient homes. Not financial advice.
locSub: Quiet village living, minutes from everything.
enquireSub: Register your interest to receive pricing, floor plans and priority access when Pre-Sale opens in September 2026.
name: Full Name
footerNote: Reservations require a 30% deposit and signed contract. Communal fees apply. Images are artist's impressions. Specifications available on request.
